channel.title: mycatalog updates
channel.description: 'My Catalog' uses the IBM Cloud catalog API to retrieve data from the catalog. It attempts to be as accurate as possible. This feed shows additions, updates, removals from the catalog. Use with care. It is a work-in-progress :)

item.title: [added] Construction Work Pack Compliance (vistergy-ltd-construction-work-pack-compliance)
item.description: Know your work packages are compliant before they reach the facility. Regulator-ready audit trail per finding.

item.title: [added] Facility Handover Compliance (vistergy-ltd-facility-handover-compliance)
item.description: Know whether your handover package is complete enough to sign off, with the gaps and the evidence, per event.
